Bellatrix Levine. | Project 237.

Bellatrix Levine is a twenty-one year old patient in Melissa City Asylum. She is in for numerous reasons. She has a very bad history with the law, including numerous arrestings for possession and use of illegal drugs across the United States aswell as Australia and some parts of Canada. She is extremely aggressive, verbally and physically. Bellatrix has been in numerous gangs along her youth, owning the street name of "cross country crow." She has self-harming and suicidal behaviors. Bellatrix's family history is also filled with the casual addicts and psychos. The whole lot of the Levine's are all bad. Melissa City Asylum is supposed to be a safe haven for those with extreme psychological trubbles, but little do the people of the large city know, MCA is actually just using their patients as social and physiological experiments to toy with..
